chemo.name: Azacitidine
notes: Rotate injection sites: abdomen, thigh, upper arm
Do not inject into bruised or inflamed areas
Continue until progression or unacceptable toxicity

nursingNotes: Indication: AML maintenance post-remission, especially unfit for intensive consolidation
Expect cytopenias — may require dose delay/reduction
Common toxicities: fatigue, nausea, local injection pain
Educate patient regarding self-care for injection-site reactions
